description: The BoxColliderGizmo component is used to resize and move BoxColliders in a visual manner using the DevTip.

fields._target: The box collider this component is currently editing
fields._cubeGizmo: The visual for this component which is used to edit ``_target`` in a visual manner.

usage: Used to adjust the size of a box collider. This can be accessed via the gizmo menu using a dev tip in your context menu. The button to activate it is the box collider option.
